raw_consumer_statement:
Flew with XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX on XXXX from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX via XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX to XXXX XXXX XXXX Agreed and paid advertised total charge online with Citibank Costco credit card visa ending in # XXXX an amount of {$1300.00} XXXX. At airport was compelled to pay additional charge in cash for two suit cases by XXXX XXXX agent {$120.00} XXXX or will not issue boarding cards. During flight had no TV/internet on both seats as advertised & could not move to other seats since plane was full - incident was reported to flight attendant sup. who alerted XXXX maintenance operation via Email. On arrival at XXXX XXXX, found one of the suit cases has been broken/vandalized by XXXX baggage handlers & personal belongings thrown all over conveyor belt. Reported incident to XXXX luggage handling supervisor who assured us to convey message to XXXX authorities. Subsequent to flight, received Citibank visa credit card with additional overcharges by XXXX of {$130.00} on statement for same subject flight. Was compelled to open XXXX claim online for this incident case # XXXX & case # XXXX who through numerous Emails used contradicting excuses for not paying anything on said claims and lying about it by providing different bogus reasons. 
Subsequently, when reporting the issue to Citibank Visa XXXX XXXX XXXX. sup. XXXX XXXX ID # XXXX Arizona office Citi ID # XXXX XXXX XXXX & ID # XXXX XXXX XXXX and the Office of the President at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX South Dakota XXXX Citibank agreed to reverse the charges. However, when they heard from XXXX that we actually did fly with XXXX, they re-reversed all charges and put them back on my statement including interest & penalties.
